name: Five Pound Fudge
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook sugar, milk, and butter until they reach the soft ball stage (234°F on a candy thermometer), stirring constantly.
2. Remove from heat and add the remaining ingredients.
3. Stir quickly and thoroughly to blend everything together.
4. Pour the mixture into a large baking pan or dish that has been lightly greased first.
5. Allow to cool completely.
6. Cut into squares and store in the refrigerator.
My favorite fudge recipe!! - Deb
From: Jackie Olden's Newsletter Posted by: Debbie Carlson (D.CARLSON) -
